hero.headline: I build AI automation that scales operations and outreach.
hero.tagline: Industrial engineer turned software engineer. I design AI agents, lead generation pipelines and scalable systems that help companies grow without adding headcount.

about.label: About
about.title: Where industry meets software
paragraphs: I am a software engineer with a background in industrial engineering and operations leadership. For years I ran warehouses, supply chains and teams of up to 60 people, then moved into software to automate the work I used to manage by hand.

Today I build AI automation and outreach systems: AI agents and AI clones, lead generation pipelines and tools that turn manual operations into scalable, repeatable processes. I founded QueryBay to package that into products other companies can use.

My edge is the combination. I understand the operation from the floor up and I can build the software that scales it. I hold degrees in manufacturing engineering and software engineering plus an MBA, and I am always looking for the next process worth automating.

skills.title: Tools I work with
skills.subtitle: From the warehouse floor to the deploy pipeline. A stack built to ship and to scale.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Let's build something together
contact.subtitle: I'm open to full time roles, freelance work and interesting collaborations. The fastest way to reach me is email.

meta.title: Jean Carrasco · AI Automation Engineer
meta.description: Jean Carrasco is a software engineer and industrial engineer who builds AI automation, lead generation systems and AI agents that scale operations. Founder of QueryBay. Open to new opportunities.
